findings.issue: Japanese-style bracket 「」 in ZH field: 关于经营者工作的内容。战略（Strategy）即「战略」之意。该领域出题涉及企业活动、法务、经营战略、信息系统战略等内容

U+30FB katakana middle dot used as bullet in zh field (style inconsistency): ・企业与法务
・经营战略
・系统战略

U+30FB katakana middle dot used as bullet in en field (style inconsistency): ・Corporate & Legal Affairs
・Management Strategy
・System Strategy

U+30FB katakana middle dot used as bullet in zh field (style inconsistency): ・开发技术
・项目管理
・服务管理（系统审计等）

U+30FB katakana middle dot used as bullet in en field (style inconsistency): ・Development Technology
・Project Management
・Service Management (System Audit, e

U+30FB katakana middle dot used as bullet in zh field (style inconsistency): ・基础理论（算法、编程等）
・计算机系统（软件、硬件等）
・技术要素（数据库、安全等）

U+30FB katakana middle dot used as bullet in en field (style inconsistency): ・Basic Theory (Algorithms, Programming, etc.)
・Computer Systems (Software, Hardw
Japanese-style bracket 「」 in ZH field: 活用碎片时间与「睡前10分钟」
Japanese-style bracket 「」 in ZH field: 长时间作答时，活用方便的「稍后复查」功能
Japanese-style bracket 「」 in ZH field: 耗时较多的「计算题」先暂时跳过
Japanese-style bracket 「」 in ZH field: 决定公司运营方针的最基本、最重要的指导原则。经营者依据经营理念运营企业，公司相关的一切事务都依照经营理念来决定。也被称为「公司存在的意义」。
Robotic MT opener 'It is the/a/an...': It is the future vision the company aims for.
Robotic MT opener 'It is the/a/an...': It is a concrete action plan to realize the vision.
Circular definition: 'Vision' defined using the word 'vision' (原JP: 将来の姿). Better: 'It is the future image/state the company aspires to.'
findings.suggestion: Replace 'future vision' with 'future image' or 'future state'

findings.issue: Trailing period '.' appended to URL, breaking hyperlink: 'https://www3.jitec.ipa.go.jp/JitesCbt/html/openinfo/questions.html.'
